parameters.query: WITH bumped AS (UPDATE apps SET current_version = current_version + 1, updated_at = now(), name = COALESCE(($2::jsonb)->>'name', name), status = COALESCE(($2::jsonb)->>'status', status) WHERE id = $1::uuid RETURNING id, current_version), new_ver AS (INSERT INTO app_versions (app_id, version, metadata, steps, blockly_state) SELECT id, current_version, ($2::jsonb)->'metadata', ($2::jsonb)->'steps', ($2::jsonb)->'blockly_state' FROM bumped RETURNING app_id, version) SELECT app_id::text AS id, version FROM new_ver
